rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDERICK LEWIS ALBERTS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Termination Of Prceedings And Discharge [Probate Code 12251]
rulings.Rulings: Continued to December 17, 2014 to allow time for the filing period for an FTB claim to expire. While a letter was filed acknowledging there is no current balance, the letter specifically reserves the right to file a claim, so this court does not close estates until the 60 day period allowed in the probate code has run. If no claim is filed, the petition will be granted without an appearance.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BERNADETTE M. BARDEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to December 3, 2014. No response to Examiner's notes 3 court days prior to the hearing as required by the Local Rules. New deadline is Wednesday, November 26, 2014. Please note, this court's policy is to continue a matter for 2 weeks for a response to the Examiner's notes, then one month if no response is filed after the first continuance. If no response is filed by November 26, 2014, the court may take the petition off calendar unless it is a mandatory petition.
